idea-plugin.name: Grasp — Code Architecture Visualizer
idea-plugin.description:
Grasp gives you a live dependency graph, architecture diagram, and health score for your project — directly in your IDE.

  • Interactive dependency graph — see how every file connects
  • Health score (A–F) with architecture issues highlighted
  • Security scanner — hardcoded secrets, injection risks
  • Auto-reanalyses on file save (2s debounce)
  • Status bar: live dep count for the active file
  • Blast radius: highlight everything that breaks if you change a file

Works with JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, Go, Java, Rust, Kotlin, and 25+ more languages.

Supports: IntelliJ IDEA, WebStorm, PyCharm, GoLand, and all JetBrains IDEs.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
• v3.1.2: Suite help panel, 48-tool MCP server, updated branding and descriptions
  • v3.1.1: Neovim plugin, GitHub Releases with signed artifacts, LICENSE bundled
  • v3.1.0: GitLab support, pro tier API keys, analysis history (90-day), Team Dashboard leaderboard, Slack Block Kit digest, Cursor IDE integration
  • v3.0.0: Hover provider, grasp.yml config enforcement, SARIF export, live health badge

Privacy Policy — Grasp collects no data. All analysis runs locally.

action.description: Run Grasp architecture analysis on this project
Focus this file in the Grasp dependency graph
